productDisplayName: Ponds Flawless White Under Eye Cream
description: Light infusing under eye cream Wakes up eyes, visibly improves under-eye dark circles Apply using light strokes under the eyes and around corners Contains VAO-B3 complex, which is the Ponds Institute's new vitamin E, Allantoin and Optics powered Niacinamide (B3) complex, especially created to deliver flawlessly radiant skin
